# Grand Hero Banner

The Grand Hero Banner is designed for maximum visual impact — typically used on homepages and major landing pages. It supports a full-width background image, heading, snippet, and up to two call-to-action buttons. The content overlay can be configured as full-width or contained to suit different compositional needs.

## Interactive Preview

Use the controls panel below to experiment with the component's properties in real-time.

## Theme Options

The Grand Hero Banner supports the full set of component theme dials:

- **Default**: Standard theme using global color settings
- **One through Five**: Custom theme dials that override global settings with component-specific colors

Use the `grand_hero__content__background` property to apply different themes.

## Overlay Variations

The Grand Hero Banner supports three overlay styles. Use the interactive preview above to switch between them, or see the [Visreg page](?path=/story/molecules-banners-grand-hero-visreg--visreg) for a side-by-side comparison.

### Contained Overlay

Content is constrained to a column width, providing a cleaner, more structured look against the full-bleed image.

<div className="sb-full-bleed-canvas">
  <Canvas of={GrandHeroStories.GrandHeroBannerContained} />
</div>

## Technical Specifications

- **Atomic Level**: Molecule
- **Template**: `grand-hero/yds-grand-hero.twig`
- **Styles**: `grand-hero/_yds-grand-hero.scss`

### Accessibility

- Semantic HTML structure with proper heading hierarchy
- Background images implemented with appropriate alternative text handling
- Interactive elements (buttons, links) are keyboard accessible with clear focus indicators
- Sufficient color contrast ratios maintained across all theme variations
- Content remains accessible when background images fail to load

### Behavior

- **Responsive Design**: Banner adapts to viewport with content scaling appropriately
- **Image Loading**: Uses responsive images with appropriate srcset for different screen sizes
- **Video Background**: When enabled, replaces the static background image with a video

## Usage Guidelines

### Best Practices

- Reserve for homepages and primary landing pages — one per page maximum
- Keep heading text bold and brief; the Grand Hero is the first thing users see
- Use high-quality, full-bleed images with a 16:9 aspect ratio
- Choose the overlay variation based on the image composition — full overlay works well with busy imagery, contained works with cleaner images

### Things to Avoid

- Don't use on interior content pages where an Action Banner or Image Banner would be more appropriate
- Avoid lengthy snippet text — the heading should carry the message
- Don't use low-contrast color combinations that make text difficult to read

## Testing

For comprehensive visual regression testing with all overlay, theme, and size variations, see the [Visreg page](?path=/story/molecules-banners-grand-hero-visreg--visreg).

## Related Components

- **Action Banner**: When you need multiple CTAs or flexible content positioning
- **Image Banner**: For visual storytelling with minimal text and no content overlay
- **Video Banner**: For video-first content presentation
